---
title: "Sessile Oak (Quercus petraea)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Quercus*](/trees/genus/quercus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 306 — Sessile oak](../306.html) |  |
| [Tree 325 — Sessile oak](../325.html) |  |
| [Tree 341 — Sessile oak](../341.html) |  |
| [Tree 358 — Sessile oak](../358.html) |  |
| [Tree 380 — Sessile oak](../380.html) |  |
